title: Ash Sailships
description: Majestic sailships await across your ocean adventure!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshSailships Datapack brings a nautical charm to Minecraft’s oceans by generating beautifully crafted sailships across the sea. Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers, this datapack adds historic and atmospheric vessels to enhance your maritime experience.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fR2K5aohLjM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

⛵ Features:

✔ Randomly Generated Sailships – Authentic sailships spawn naturally across ocean biomes.
✔ Static Structures – Ships are stationary and serve as immersive ocean landmarks.

🌊 Spawn Mechanics:

Sailships spawn randomly in ocean biomes as part of natural world generation. The datapack is compatible with both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

⚙️ How to Install:

Open your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).
Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder inside your world directory.
Launch Minecraft and enter your world.
Type /reload if you're already in-game to activate the datapack.

That’s it! Now set sail and explore majestic sailships drifting across your Minecraft seas. More ships are on the horizon! ⛵🌊🏴‍☠️

💬 Got ship ideas? Join my [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/) and help shape the next fleet!
